description_long: This nightstand features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a slightly distressed, light gray painted body and a dark, textured wooden top. The front showcases a single drawer with a decorative handle and a lower cabinet door adorned with ornate paneling and a keyhole, suggesting a lockable compartment. The legs are elegantly curved in a cabriole style, adding to its antique charm. The sides are plain, with the left side displaying a protruding key and the right side showing a subtle handle. The back is constructed from a different, natural wood finish, indicating a less visible surface. Decorative carvings and moldings are present on the front, enhancing its ornamental appeal.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with a distressed gray body, dark wood top, ornate front paneling, and curved cabriole legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a decorative handle, ornate cabinet door, and curved legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain panel and a protruding key near the cabinet door.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain, natural wood finish and no visible hardware or decoration.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain panel and a subtle handle near the cabinet door.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
